clean_headline: Sansera Engineering scheduled group meeting with investors and analysts on March 17, 2026 at company plants in Bangalore.
raw_headline: Intimation under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

clean_headline: Aditya Birla Lifestyle Brands disclosed Central Tax orders issued to the company related to its demerged business from Aditya Birla Fashion and Retail Limited.
raw_headline: Intimation in terms of SEBI Circular SEBI/HO/MIRSD/DOS3/CIR/P/2018/139 dated 6th November, 2018 pertaining to issue of entitlement letter to the transferees
